summary: Phase 2 gate logic testing: sequential module locking, DQF gate submission, PENDING badge, admin gate-reviews page, and approve workflow all verified.

minor.issue: Returns 403 (not 401) for unauthenticated requests. _require_coach raises 403 Forbidden instead of 401 Unauthorized for unauthenticated callers.
Dead code at lines 287-319 after `return {"ok": True}` in mark_module_complete. Appears to be a copy-paste artifact from ground0_waitlist function. No runtime impact but should be cleaned up.

ui_bugs.issue: DQF gate content description text overflows and overlaps with the submit button modal area. The text appears to render in a very large vertical column layout causing visual overlap with the attestation/submit button region.

action_items: Clean up dead code in portal.py lines 287-319 (unreachable after return statement in mark_module_complete)
Fix DQF gate section text overflow/overlap issue in VideoLessonWorkbench lesson 1.7 view
Optional: change _require_coach to raise 401 instead of 403 for unauthenticated (no session) requests
